case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. ADAM HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2014
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM $1,515.33 PRINCIPAL, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,804.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED APR-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $289.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ADAM
NOTICE INTENTION TO INCUR COURT COSTS AND LEGAL FEES BY FILING SUIT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
